status_values.label: Official free
status_values.summary: Official live or replay access appears available without an account.

status_values.label: Official account
status_values.summary: Official live or replay access appears available with a non-betting account login.

status_values.label: Betting account
status_values.summary: Access appears tied to a betting, wagering, tote, or deposit account.

status_values.label: Paid TV
status_values.summary: Access appears tied to a paid television or subscription package.

status_values.label: Broadcast partner
status_values.summary: Access appears provided by an official broadcast or streaming partner.

status_values.label: Social stream
status_values.summary: Official or official-partner social stream appears available.

status_values.label: Racecourse only
status_values.summary: Viewing appears available through racecourse-level channels or venue-specific official sources.

status_values.label: Event only
status_values.summary: Availability appears limited to specific events, seasons, or special broadcasts.

status_values.label: Geo-restricted
status_values.summary: Official access appears restricted by country or region.

status_values.label: Not verified
status_values.summary: No sufficient official evidence has been checked yet.

status_values.label: None found
status_values.summary: Official research found no usable official live or replay source.

status_values.label: Archive only
status_values.summary: Only archived or historical official video appears available.

status_values.label: Unsafe unofficial
status_values.summary: Unofficial video was found but must not be displayed as a usable source.
